mapper.sql: p.id, p.company_user_id, p.title, p.job_role, p.employment_type, p.career_level, p.career_years_min, p.career_years_max, p.education_level, p.salary_text, p.salary_negotiable, p.work_location, p.work_hours, p.deadline_date, p.always_open, p.main_tasks, p.requirements, p.preferred, p.benefits, p.hiring_process, p.headcount, p.tags_json, p.status, p.reject_reason, p.view_count, p.published_at, p.closed_at, p.reviewed_by, p.reviewed_at, p.created_at, p.updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company_job_posting (company_user_id, title, job_role, employment_type, career_level, career_years_min, career_years_max, education_level, salary_text, salary_negotiable, work_location, work_hours, deadline_date, always_open, main_tasks, requirements, preferred, benefits, hiring_process, headcount, tags_json, status, published_at) VALUES (#{companyUserId}, #{title}, #{jobRole}, #{employmentType}, #{careerLevel}, #{careerYearsMin}, #{careerYearsMax}, #{educationLevel}, #{salaryText}, #{salaryNegotiable}, #{workLocation}, #{workHours}, #{deadlineDate}, #{alwaysOpen}, #{mainTasks}, #{requirements}, #{preferred}, #{benefits}, #{hiringProcess}, #{headcount}, #{tagsJson}, #{status}, #{publishedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT , cp.company_name AS company_name, cp.trust_grade AS trust_grade FROM company_job_posting p LEFT JOIN company_profile cp ON cp.user_id = p.company_user_id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM company_job_posting p WHERE p.id = #{id} FOR UPDATE

SELECT , cp.company_name AS company_name, cp.trust_grade AS trust_grade, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM company_job_posting_revision r WHERE r.job_posting_id = p.id AND r.status = 'PENDING') AS has_pending_revision FROM company_job_posting p LEFT JOIN company_profile cp ON cp.user_id = p.company_user_id WHERE p.company_user_id = #{companyUserId} ORDER BY p.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE company_job_posting SET title = #{title}, job_role = #{jobRole}, employment_type = #{employmentType}, career_level = #{careerLevel}, career_years_min = #{careerYearsMin}, career_years_max = #{careerYearsMax}, education_level = #{educationLevel}, salary_text = #{salaryText}, salary_negotiable = #{salaryNegotiable}, work_location = #{workLocation}, work_hours = #{workHours}, deadline_date = #{deadlineDate}, always_open = #{alwaysOpen}, main_tasks = #{mainTasks}, requirements = #{requirements}, preferred = #{preferred}, benefits = #{benefits}, hiring_process = #{hiringProcess}, headcount = #{headcount}, tags_json = #{tagsJson} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE company_job_posting SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = CASE WHEN #{reviewedBy} IS NULL THEN reviewed_at ELSE NOW() END WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE company_job_posting SET status = 'PUBLISHED', reject_reason = NULL, published_at = COALESCE(published_at, NOW()), reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = CASE WHEN #{reviewedBy} IS NULL THEN reviewed_at ELSE NOW() END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE company_job_posting SET status = 'CLOSED', closed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.sql:
FROM company_job_posting p LEFT JOIN company_profile cp ON cp.user_id = p.company_user_id
p.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.job_role LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR cp.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.job_role LIKE CONCAT('%', #{jobRole}, '%')
AND p.work_location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{location}, '%')
AND p.employment_type = #{employmentType}
AND p.career_level = #{careerLevel}
mapper.select:
SELECT , cp.company_name AS company_name, cp.trust_grade AS trust_grade
ORDER BY p.always_open ASC, p.deadline_date IS NULL ASC, p.deadline_date ASC, p.id DESC
ORDER BY p.view_count DESC, p.id DESC
ORDER BY p.published_at DESC, p.id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT 'CREATE' AS review_type, p.id AS posting_id, NULL AS revision_id, p.title AS title, p.job_role AS job_role, cp.company_name AS company_name, cp.trust_grade AS trust_grade, p.updated_at AS submitted_at FROM company_job_posting p LEFT JOIN company_profile cp ON cp.user_id = p.company_user_id WHERE p.status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' UNION ALL SELECT 'UPDATE' AS review_type, p.id AS posting_id, r.id AS revision_id, p.title AS title, p.job_role AS job_role, cp.company_name AS company_name, cp.trust_grade AS trust_grade, r.updated_at AS submitted_at FROM company_job_posting_revision r JOIN company_job_posting p ON p.id = r.job_posting_id LEFT JOIN company_profile cp ON cp.user_id = p.company_user_id WHERE r.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY submitted_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company_job_posting_revision (job_posting_id, payload_json, status) VALUES (#{jobPostingId}, #{payloadJson}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, job_posting_id, payload_json, status, reject_reason, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM company_job_posting_revision WHERE job_posting_id = #{postingId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE company_job_posting_revision SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT config_json FROM admin_system_policy WHERE policy_code = 'JOB_POSTING_REVIEW_POLICY' AND active = 1
